subcodes.first_line: O Ashraf! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto the recognition of the Manifestation of the Self of God and art numbered among them that have become unified. By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اشرف طوبی لک بما تشرفت بعرفان مظهر نفس الله و صرت من الموحدین تالله هذا
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
